no malicious activity is evident.\n   - **Obfuscated score:** 0 is appropriate; code is clear and straightforward.\n   - **Risk score:** 0 is appropriate; the code does not introduce any security vulnerabilities or risks.\n\n5. **Potential Concerns or Assumptions:**\n   - Since the code is purely re-exporting modules, unless the imported modules themselves are malicious, this index file is benign.\n   - The source map comment is standard and not suspicious.\n   - No evidence suggests any hidden malicious behavior or backdoors.\n\n6. **Overall Conclusion:**\n   - The code is a standard, benign module index file.\n   - The scores assigned in the reports are appropriate and consistent.\n   - No modifications to the scores are necessary based on the provided code and reports.\n\n**Final Estimation:**\n- **Malware score:** 0\n- **Obfuscated score:** 0\n- **Risk score:** 0\n\nThis assessment aligns with the evidence and analysis.",
